full_text:
Gong Qi
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gong Qi. Sent to stop a Wei relief force but was killed by Wang Shuang in a duel. Gong Qi is a fictional character. Gong Qi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
